summary: v1.13.0 backend testing complete. Focus AF sync + AE mode Auto/Manual toggle features verified. All 9 test suites pass with 286 total assertions. New focus-af-sync-ae-toggle.test.js (33 assertions) passes exit 0. Syntax check on src/actions.js, src/main.js, src/variables.js — all OK.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking issues. The refreshFocusFromCamera helper correctly handles the null-visca case (Test 8 passed with no crash). setTimeout delays (1200ms/2000ms) are reasonable for real AF settling. The ae_mode_toggle action correctly distinguishes proper AE mode (VISCA 0x39) from expcomp_toggle (VISCA 0x3E) — good separation of concerns.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full regression across 9 suites: step-calibration (26), axis-home-and-zoom (32), backlight-focus-home (40), focus-tracking (40), realtime-publish (22), expcomp-iris (43), manifest-sync (21), rotary-track-expcomp-toggle (29), focus-af-sync-ae-toggle (33) = 286 assertions total. All pass. v1.13.0 tarball at /app/companion-module-tenveo-ptz/tenveo-ptz-1.13.0.tgz.

detailed_test_verification.focus_auto: PASS — sends 81 01 04 38 02 FF, state.af='on', publishes af/focus_mode='Auto', triggers af_state feedback, after 1200ms syncs focusPos=9500 and publishes focus_position=9500, focus_percent=58
detailed_test_verification.focus_manual: PASS — sends 81 01 04 38 03 FF, state.af='off', focus_mode='Manual', focusPos synced to 2000 after ~500ms
detailed_test_verification.focus_one_push: PASS — publishes focus_mode='One-Push' immediately, ~2s later reverts to Manual (af=off) with focusPos=4000
detailed_test_verification.focus_toggle: PASS — flips state.af between on/off and publishes Auto/Manual accordingly
detailed_test_verification.ae_mode_toggle: PASS — action registered with label 'Exposure: Toggle Auto ↔ Manual (AE mode)', flips FULL_AUTO(0x00) ↔ MANUAL(0x03), sends 81 01 04 39 xx FF, publishes exposure_mode label, triggers exposure_mode feedback
detailed_test_verification.focus_auto_no_visca: PASS — no crash, state.af still updates to 'on'
detailed_test_verification.exposure_mode_label: PASS — SHUTTER_PRI (0x0A) sets state.aeMode and publishes 'Shutter Pri' label
